title: Vietnamese Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious Vietnamese-inspired dish made with stir-fried vegetables and eggs.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped bell peppers and stir-fry until tender.
Add the rice noodles and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Push the noodles to one side of the wok.
Crack in the eggs and scramble them until cooked through.
Mix the eggs with the noodles and vegetables.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped herbs if desired.
Cook time can be adjusted based on personal preference.
